analysis.name: Rave
analysis.summary: KRAV是Solana上的去中心化永续合约交易所代币，支持以山寨币为抵押做多/做空BTC。近期价格下跌，流动性低，成交量极小，缺乏近期催化剂，风险较高。
catalysts: 项目概念独特（首个去中心化永续quanto交易所）
可能的新交易所上线或合作

latestNews.title: Rave Price, KRAV Price, Live Charts, and Marketcap: krypto rave, kryptowaluta rave, rave altcoin

fundamentals: Krav是Solana上的去中心化永续quanto交易所，允许用户用山寨币作为抵押品交易BTC杠杆，盈亏以山寨币结算。
代币总供应量100亿，当前流通8.54亿，流通市值约112万美元，FDV约112万美元。
项目有流动性提供者（LP）赚取交易费机制，以及限价单功能。
marketRead: 24小时交易量仅3.92美元，流动性极差，几乎无交易活动。
价格较历史高点下跌98%，处于深度下跌趋势。
Raydium上KRAV/USDC池流动性约474万美元，但交易量极低，可能存在虚假流动性。
risks: 流动性极低，交易量几乎为零，存在滑点和无法卖出风险。
代币价格持续下跌，30日跌幅24%，无反弹迹象。
项目知名度低，缺乏近期新闻和催化剂。
合约风险：未开源或审计情况不明。
供应量大，未来解锁可能带来抛压。
watchlist: 是否有新交易所上线或做市商引入
项目方是否发布更新或合作公告
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来源为Google News聚合，时效性差。
市场数据中24小时价格变化为null，可能因数据缺失。

profile.name: Rave
profile.description: What is the project about? Krav is a decentralized perpetual crypto quanto exchange What makes your project unique? Krav is the first-ever decentralized perpetual quanto exchange. At Krav, you can leverage BTC trades using any altcoin as collateral, and have the gains and losses settled in altcoins. What innovations does Krav offer? Catering to Traders and Liquidity Providers (LPs): Project Krav's unique mechanism allows traders to utilize altcoins to open long or short positions on Bitcoin (BTC), catering to a broad spectrum of trading strategies. Meanwhile, LPs have an opportunity to earn transaction fees each time traders modify their positions, offering a potential for steady income. Enabling Strategic Trading with Limit Orders: The ability to set limit orders offers users enhanced control over their trading strategies. The added layer of execution fees attached to limit orders means traders can further fine-tune their strategies to optimize potential profits. Risk Mitigation Measures: Krav incorporates critical risk management tools to safeguard the interests of its users. The funding fee mechanism balances the distribution of long and short positions, mitigating systemic risk
